issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Only one realistic example is provided, lacking a second demonstration.

scenarios.name: Plan rollout of a multi-file task CRUD feature
scenarios.rationale: Treatment plans the work as vertical slices (create -> list -> edit -> delete) where each slice leaves the system working and is followed by `npm test` and `npm run build` plus a commit, mirroring the skill's slicing strategy and increment cycle; baseline produced a flat task list mixing schema, API, and UI without slice boundaries.

scenarios.name: Implement WebSocket-based real-time updates with unknown risk
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies risk-first slicing (prove WebSocket connection first, then real-time updates, then offline/reconnection) and gates each increment on tests passing and a commit, matching the skill's Risk-First strategy; baseline jumped straight to full implementation without de-risking the connection first.
